⊢ ‖A‖ ≤ ↑(Fintype.card n) * ‖A‖ ∧
    ‖A‖ ≤ ↑(Fintype.card n) * sorry A ∧
      ‖A‖ ≤ ‖A‖ ∧ ‖A‖ ≤ √↑(Fintype.card n) * ‖A‖ ∧ ‖A‖ ≤ √↑(Fintype.card n) * ‖A‖ ∧ ‖A‖ ≤ √↑(Fintype.card n) * sorry A

case refine_4
m : Type u_4

inst✝³ : Fintype m

A : Matrix m n ℝ
⊢ ‖A‖ ≤ √(↑(Fintype.card m) * ↑(Fintype.card n)) * ‖A‖ ∧
    ‖A‖ ≤ √↑(Fintype.card n) * sorry A ∧ ‖A‖ ≤ √↑(Fintype.card m) * ‖A‖ ∧ ‖A‖ ≤ ‖A‖ ∧ ‖A‖ ≤ ‖A‖ ∧ ‖A‖ ≤ sorry A
